title: armeria maritima var. matritensis
intro: Armeria maritima var. matritensis, also known as the Spanish sea thrift, is a variety of the armeria maritima plant, a low-growing, perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Armeria maritima var. matritensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
